# programs.hyprlock

All options under `programs.hyprlock`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.hyprlock.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable hyprlock, Hyprland's GPU-accelerated screen locking utility. |
